channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Pope had a good night's rest after overcoming possible risks from respiratory crisis
item.description: ROME (AP) — Pope Francis had a good night’s rest early Monday after apparently overcoming a setback in his recovery from pneumonia: He is stable, off mechanical ventilation and shows no sign of new infection following a respiratory crisis late last week.
item.dc:creator: NICOLE WINFIELD, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Inside the Oscars: What you didn’t see on the broadcast
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — What you see on the television broadcast is only part of the story at the Oscars. There's a whole world of action happening in between commercial breaks, and at the lobby bar in the Dolby Theatre — where nominees and winners convene, commiserate and celebrate.
item.dc:creator: LINDSEY BAHR, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: 3.9 magnitude earthquake jolts Los Angeles after Oscars
item.description: An earthquake with a preliminary magnitude of 3.9 jolted through Los Angeles mere hours after the Academy Awards concluded on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Lily Dallow, NewsNation

item.title: Oscars' choreographer Mandy Moore on 'Wicked' opening, Quincy Jones and that salute to James Bond
item.description: Mandy Moore’s choreography for Ryan Gosling’s performance of “I’m Just Ken” at last years’ Academy Awards stole the show. This year, she aimed to once again “make something that makes people feel,” she told The Associated Press over the phone ahead of the Oscars.
item.dc:creator: MARIA SHERMAN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Strip club Cinderella story 'Anora' wins best picture at 97th Academy Awards
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — "Anora,” a strip club Cinderella story without the fairy tale ending, was crowned best picture at the 97th Academy Awards on Sunday, handing Sean Baker’s gritty, Brooklyn-set screwball farce Hollywood’s top prize.
item.dc:creator: JAKE COYLE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Lethal injection, electrocution and now firing squads. A look at US execution methods
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — South Carolina is preparing this week to execute a man by firing squad, a capital punishment method that hasn’t been used in the U.S. in nearly 15 years.
item.dc:creator: JUAN A. LOZANO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Michigan mother asks judge to declare 3 missing sons dead nearly 15 years later
item.description: ADRIAN, Mich. (AP) — A Michigan woman is asking a judge to declare her three missing sons dead, nearly 15 years after their father didn't return them after Thanksgiving. The disappearance has tormented a small town near Ohio and remains unsolved.
item.dc:creator: ED WHITE, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Trump's next first speech to Congress is bound to have little resemblance to his last first one
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The nation will hear a new president sing a far different tune in his prime-time address before Congress on Tuesday night. Some Americans will lustily sing along. Others will plug their ears.
item.dc:creator: CALVIN WOODWARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Crews battle wildfires in North and South Carolina amid dry conditions and gusty winds
item.description: Crews battled wildfires in North and South Carolina on Sunday amid dry conditions and gusty winds as residents were forced to evacuate in some areas.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Joe Highsmith goes from making the cut to a PGA Tour winner at the Cognizant Classic
item.description: PALM BEACH GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Joe Highsmith could feel himself crumbling under the pressure at the Cognizant Classic. This was on Friday, when the only thing at stake was making the cut.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: The Oscars 2025: How to watch, and when the show begins
item.description: This will mark the culmination of one of the most topsy-turvey Oscars seasons Hollywood has ever seen.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump announces US crypto reserve
item.description: President Trump announced Sunday that the U.S. would be creating a crypto reserve, to boost the growing industry.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: Crowds protest near Vermont ski resort where JD Vance planned vacation with family
item.description: WAITSFIELD, Vt. (AP) — Crowds protesting Vice President JD Vance the day after an Oval Office blowout over Ukraine lined roadways Saturday near a Vermont ski resort where he planned a weekend vacation with his family.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hegseth directs civilian workers of DoD to reply to OPM email
item.description: In a video posted to X by the DoD, Hegseth specified that only civilian workers should reply to the email and CC their "immediate supervisors.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Chanel event brings Oscar nominees together the night before the big show
item.description: The patio of the storied Polo Lounge at the Beverly Hills Hotel was packed to the brim with Hollywood stars for the annual Chanel and Charles Finch dinner on Saturday, the final event before the 97th Academy Awards.
item.dc:creator: LINDSEY BAHR, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Firefighters working to contain wildfires in North, South Carolina
item.description: Crews have been battling wildfires in North and South Carolina this weekend, competing with dry conditions and gusty winds.
item.dc:creator: Adam Benson, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Coast Guard intercepts 21 illegal immigrants off California coast
item.description: The U.S. Coast Guard on Friday caught nearly two dozen illegal immigrants in a boat off the coast of Point Loma in California.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Indiana parents arrested for abuse after allegedly zip-tying 10-year-old son, telling sibling to beat him up
item.description: An Indiana couple is accused of inflicting "nutritional" neglect on their 10-year-old son, zip-tying him and telling his siblings to beat him up.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Avalanche land Lindgren, Wild get Nyquist and Panthers acquire Seth Jones in busy day of NHL trades
item.description: Defensemen Seth Jones and Ryan Lindgren and forward Gustav Nyquist were on the move on Saturday as three Central Division teams got a jump on the NHL’s looming trade deadline.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Lifelong New York civil rights advocate and NAACP leader Hazel Dukes dies at 92
item.description: Hazel Dukes, the president of the New York State chapter of the NAACP and lifelong civil rights advocate, died Saturday at the age of 92. Dukes peacefully passed away in her New York City home surrounded by family, her son, Ronald Dukes, said in a statement.
item.dc:creator: SEJAL GOVINDARAO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Nevada man pleads guilty to extorting Instagram users, influencers
item.description: A Las Vegas man has pleaded guilty to extorting and threatening Instagram users and influencers, according to court documents.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, WGN 9

item.title: David Johansen, singer from the seminal punk band the New York Dolls, dies at 75
item.description: Johansen died Friday at his home in New York City, Jeff Kilgour, a family spokesperson told The Associated Press. It was revealed in early 2025 that he had stage 4 cancer and a brain tumor.
item.dc:creator: Mark Kennedy, Fox 5

item.title: Lee Kunzman, 'persistent' Indy 500 veteran, dies at 80
item.description: Kunzman's best finish in his INDYCAR SERIES career was in 1979, when he placed second at Atlanta Motor Speedway. It was just a narrow loss to winner Johnny Rutherford, IMS officials said.
item.dc:creator: Cooper Hudson, KRON4

item.title: Singer Angie Stone killed in car crash after leaving Alabama performance
item.description: Stone was riding in the back of a vehicle that "flipped over and subsequently hit by a big rig," according to family and friends.
item.dc:creator: Michaela Ratliff, KRON4

item.title: FedEx cargo plane makes emergency landing following bird strike and engine fire
item.description: A FedEx cargo plane made an emergency landing at a busy New Jersey airport on Saturday after a bird strike caused an engine fire that could be seen in the morning sky.
item.dc:creator: PATRICK WHITTLE and SARAH BRUMFIELD, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: For Gene Hackman, Santa Fe was a refuge from the limelight
item.description: SANTA FE, N.M. (AP) — The piñon- and juniper-scented Rocky Mountain foothills overlooking Santa Fe have helped the city earn a reputation as a refuge for famous actors and authors seeking to escape the spotlight.
item.dc:creator: SUSAN MONTOYA BRYAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Judge blocks Trump order threatening funding for institutions that offer care for transgender youth
item.description: SEATTLE (AP) — President Donald Trump’s plan to pull federal funding from institutions that provide gender-affirming care for transgender youth will remain blocked on a long-term basis under a federal judge's ruling in Seattle late Friday. U.S.
item.dc:creator: GENE JOHNSON, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: The world's most famous sled dog race is longer than ever. Here's a look at Iditarod, by the numbers
item.description: Thanks to a lack of snow, this year's edition of the Iditarod Trail Sled Dog Race needed a new route across the Alaska wilderness. The course change adds more than 100 miles (161 kilometers), so teams of dogs will have to pull their mushers over 1,100 miles (1,770 kilometers) to the finish line.
item.dc:creator: MARK THIESSEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Is there a secret behind the Netflix intro sound? Some viewers seem to think so
item.description: The origin of the familiar sound has become a topic of conversation among online conspiracy theorists in recent years.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, KRON4

item.title: Video shows implosion of iconic Six Flags rollercoaster Kingda Ka
item.description: The king has fallen. The legendary Kingda Ka ride at Six Flags Great Adventure in New Jersey was imploded on Friday morning.
item.dc:creator: Dominique Jack, ABC 4

item.title: Tate brothers, who face human trafficking charges in Romania, are back in the US: What to know
item.description: Influencer brothers Andrew and Tristan Tate, who are charged with human trafficking in Romania, arrived Thursday in the U.S. after authorities lifted travel restrictions on the siblings, who have millions of online followers.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, Fox 5

item.title: Pope had bronchial spasm, resulted in him inhaling vomit, Vatican says
item.description: Pope Francis suffered a bronchial spasm on Friday that resulted in him breathing in vomit, requiring non-invasive mechanical ventilation, the Vatican said in relaying a setback in his two-week long battle against double pneumonia.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Best mullet? Best use of Taylor Swift? AP hands out its own movie awards ahead of the Oscars
item.description: Hollywood's never-ending awards season can make it easy to get a little lost in the run-of-the-mill “best” categories. Actor. Actress. Director. Picture. A great movie can be reduced to a single performance; those that are left out seem to simply vanish for a while.
item.dc:creator: JAKE COYLE and LINDSEY BAHR, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Suspect in Julio Foolio murder fights solitary confinement as prosecutors warns of witness threats
item.description: One of the men accused in the Julio Foolio murder case was back in court Thursday, this time focusing on his conditions in solitary confinement.
item.dc:creator: Georgia McCarthur, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Gene Hackman, wife Betsy Arakawa were dead for some time, found in different rooms, investigators say
item.description: A spokesperson for the state’s medical examiner declined to comment on whether any conclusions had been reached on the cause.
item.dc:creator: Susan Montoya Bryan, WFLA, NBC
